realistic_test_cases.title: Meat cold-chain loss prevention — golden case
Energy loss detected from utility bill trend
Excess inventory with confirmed past write-off
Idle machinery flagged, no financial data supplied
Water leakage with only a supplier repair quote as evidence

failure_cases.title: Asserting a verified loss from a forecast figure
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: agent labels the figure 'forecast', never 'verified loss', unless actual verified loss evidence exists

failure_cases.title: Treating a supplier's savings claim as independent evidence
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: agent flags the supplier quote as a price offer only and requests independent technical verification

failure_cases.title: Treating missing data as zero loss
failure_cases.expected_behaviour: agent lists the missing inputs in missing_data and does not conclude zero loss or reduce urgency because data is absent
